synthesis.driver: Hormuz conflict escalation is pushing war premium up, but oversupply keeps Brent flat.
synthesis.based_on: Stocks drift higher on Wall Street as oil prices swing

takes.supertankers increasingly bear brunt in: Tanker attacks amplify Hormuz risks, nudging war premium higher despite oversupply cap.
takes.iran s tanker attacks squeeze the hormuz: Iran's attacks tighten Hormuz shipping, driving war premium up against a supply glut.
takes.white house weighs jones act waiver exte: Jones Act waiver signals U.S. concern over Hormuz, supporting upward war premium pressure.
takes.inflation cools but oil prices back up s: Cooling inflation limits demand upside, capping oil prices despite Hormuz escalation risks.
